overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player waits at an intersection with pedestrians passing by, then navigates through neon-lit streets, makes a left turn, and finally stops at a red traffic light, with holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture visible throughout.

events.description: vehicle begins accelerating from a stopped position at the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection while pedestrians walk past on the right sidewalk, then beginning to accelerate

notable_agents.action: walking with an umbrella along the sidewalk
cream-colored sedan stopped ahead at the intersection

entered.detail: cream-colored sedan stopped at the intersection ahead with brake lights illuminated
covered pedestrian walkway with concrete pillars and neon lighting
building with glowing pink and cyan neon signage visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the vehicle stopped at a covered intersection during a rainy night. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the right sidewalk while the player waits behind a cream-colored car. Neon lights illuminate the buildings in the distance, and the windshield shows rain droplets.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: accelerating through the intersection leaving the stopped vehicle behind
executing a left turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the city streets, passing holographic billboards and making a left turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow vehicle parked on the right side of the street near the intersection

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying cyan and pink graphics
elevated roadway structure with concrete support pillars spanning across
tall cylindrical digital advertising pillar with rotating illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates into a wide-open downtown street lined with holographic advertisements and elevated highway structures. The camera turns left at an intersection, passing a yellow parked vehicle. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings as the car navigates through the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with glass facades

agents.ego_description: cruising down the multi-lane street past illuminated glass towers and digital billboards

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass windows and internal cyan lighting
yellow illuminated bollards lining the right edge of the roadway
overhead pedestrian bridge or walkway crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving straight through a commercial corridor dominated by glass office towers and bright neon signage. Yellow illuminated bollards line the right side of the road, and an underpass structure looms ahead. The wet streets create reflective surfaces for the surrounding cyan and pink neon lights.

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop behind a white car at a red traffic light

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop behind a white sedan at the red traffic light

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at the red traffic light ahead

entered.detail: traffic signal displaying red light suspended over the intersection
building entrance with bright pink neon lighting and glass doors

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates as it approaches a red traffic light, coming to a stop behind a white sedan. A storefront with bright pink neon lighting is visible on the right, and the traffic light hangs overhead displaying red. The scene ends with the vehicle waiting at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from a stationary wait at a covered intersection to a high-speed cruise through a neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins behind a cream-colored car as pedestrians with umbrellas pass by under the glow of distant neon lights and rain droplets streak the windshield. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene opens into a wide downtown street where the camera turns left past a yellow parked car, with the wet asphalt reflecting towering holographic advertisements and elevated highways. The movement then carries the vehicle straight through a corridor of glass office towers and yellow illuminated bollards, passing under a looming structure amidst a wash of cyan and pink light. Finally, the car decelerates and comes to a stop behind a white sedan at a red traffic light, facing a storefront bathed in bright pink neon.
